summary: Completed comprehensive testing of subscription/pricing system and multi-user trip features. All backend APIs and frontend pages working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/plans returns 3 plans (Explorer $0, Voyager $9, Odyssey $19)
Backend: GET /api/subscription/status returns 'free' plan for test user
Backend: POST /api/subscription/checkout creates Stripe checkout session successfully
Backend: GET /api/trips/69dd58b0c6fe98204ff8ea9b shows 4 participants with 67% readiness score
Backend: Barcelona confirmed as winning destination with 7 votes
Backend: GET /api/trips/69dd58b0c6fe98204ff8ea9b/availability-heatmap shows 6 participants (4 users + 2 guests)
Backend: All existing features (budget tracker, polls, notifications, guest availability) working
Frontend: /pricing page renders with 3 plan cards (Explorer, Voyager, Odyssey)
Frontend: Pricing page has FAQ section with 4 items
Frontend: Landing page navbar has 'Pricing' link
Frontend: Dashboard shows Cormorant Garamond font on heading
Frontend: Dashboard has 'Upgrade' badge linking to /pricing
Frontend: TripWorkspace shows Trip Progress bar with 67% readiness
Frontend: TripWorkspace shows Barcelona as top destination
Frontend: TripWorkspace progress bar shows SETUP and PREFS completed (green checkmarks)
Frontend: TripWorkspace shows VOTE step completed with green checkmark
Frontend: TripWorkspace shows 4/4 participants with all preferences done
Frontend: Group Progress section shows all 4 participants (Alice, Bob, Claire, David) as 'Done'
